title: Architecture Map
subtitle: tree renderer and map validation
description: Self-map for this AI Studio workspace tree: live HTML renderer, declarative tree data, and validation report for unmapped or stale paths.

children.title: tree.json
children.description: Declarative source for the working AI Studio workspace tree: hierarchy, node ids, manual labels, roles, tags, explicit child order, and shallow workspace roots.
children.role: declarative source of the AI Studio workspace tree

children.title: README.md
children.description: Architecture Map module contract: tree.json is architecture truth, index.html only renders, validate_map.mjs only audits.

children.title: Architecture Map Surface
children.description: Browser surface and renderer for tree.json and validation-report.json. It is hosted by Studio Shell but owned by Architecture Map.

children.title: validate_map.mjs
children.description: Scans AI Studio source locations and shallow workspace folder roots, then writes validation-report.json with unmapped, missing, duplicate, and underspecified paths.
children.role: architecture map scanner and report writer

children.title: tree/
children.description: Split architecture tree parts: one JSON file per top-level workspace child, listed by the ai_studio/tree.json index and merged back into one tree by tree_loader.mjs.

children.title: tree_loader.mjs
children.description: Loads the ai_studio/tree.json index and merges the architecture_map/tree/ parts into one workspace tree for the validator, the Studio Shell route, and the renderer.
children.role: architecture tree loader and part merger

children.title: api.mjs
children.description: Provides architecture map HTTP API adapter.

children.title: tree_split.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies architecture tree split and API contracts.
children.role: architecture tree split and API tests

children.title: surface_legacy_removal.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies that the map surface keeps the ownership hierarchy contract without legacy relationship-model code or controls.
children.role: architecture map hierarchy-only surface contract test
